title: actinocephalus pachyphyllus
intro: Actinocephalus pachyphyllus, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a type of herb native to Brazil. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Actinocephalus pachyphyllus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its essential oils, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
